Notes: Primary key preservation. Non-negotiable — needed for reconciliation, dedup, and line linkage.
Exact's human-readable PO number. Cannot map to name — Odoo auto-generates name as a sequence (e.g., PO00001). Stored for reference/traceability.
Vendor account. Lookup: Exact Account GUID → res.partner via x_aa_exact_id. Already mapped in Contacts domain.
Contact person at supplier. Lookup via x_aa_exact_id on res.partner. No native Odoo PO field for supplier contact — custom field needed.
Lookup: Exact PaymentCondition code → account.payment.term via x_aa_code. Already mapped in Contacts domain.
Lookup by ISO currency code → res.currency.name. Foundational data — assumed pre-existing in Odoo.
Delivery/drop-ship address. Odoo has native dest_address_id for this. Lookup via x_aa_exact_id on res.partner.
Contact person at delivery address. No native equivalent — custom field.
Buyer/purchase agent. Maps to Odoo's native user_id (Buyer). Lookup: Exact employee/user GUID → res.users. Dependency: requires user mapping (not yet mapped).
Odoo uses picking_type_id to determine incoming operation type (and hence warehouse). Lookup requires warehouse mapping. Dependency: not yet mapped.
Incoterm. Lookup by code → account.incoterms. Odoo has native support.
Audit field. Lookup user GUID → res.users. Default to admin if unmapped.
Audit field. Lookup user GUID → res.users. Default to admin if unmapped.
Maps to company. Single-division migration → hardcode to target company.
Order date. Direct mapping.
Expected goods receipt date → Odoo's date_planned (Expected Arrival).
Approval/confirmation datetime. Maps to Odoo's date_approve (Confirmation Date).
Audit: creation timestamp.
Audit: last modification timestamp.
PO description. Odoo's name is auto-generated sequence — cannot repurpose. No other native description field on purchase.order. Custom field.
Vendor/supplier reference number. Direct match to Odoo's partner_ref.
Remarks → Odoo's notes (Terms and Conditions). Type conversion: plain text → HTML.
Exchange rate. Maps to Odoo's native currency_rate.
Incoterm location/address. Direct match to Odoo's incoterm_location.
Drop-ship flag. Odoo handles drop-shipping via routes, not a flag on PO. Custom field for reference.

How PO was created (1=Manual, 2=Import, 3=Other, 4=PO, 5=SO, 6=Supplier items, 7=Subcontract, 8=PO advice, 9=Shop order, 10=MRP, 11=REST API, 12=Merge). No Odoo equivalent. Custom field for audit trail.
Incoterm year version (2010/2020). Odoo doesn't track the version. Custom field.
Exact status (10=Open, 20=Partial, 30=Complete, 40=Canceled). Stored as-is for reference. State derivation uses this — see Derived rows.
Receipt status (10=Open, 20=Partial, 30=Complete, 40=Canceled). No single Odoo equivalent — Odoo computes receipt status from stock.picking. Stored for reference.
Invoice status (10=Open, 20=Partial, 30=Complete, 40=Canceled). Odoo computes invoice_status dynamically from bill lines. Stored for reference.
Approval status (0=Awaiting, 1=Auto, 2=Approved). Odoo has optional purchase approval workflow but status is embedded in state. Custom field.
Back-to-back SO reference. Stored as char (GUID) for traceability. Cross-linking to sale.order can be done post-migration if SO domain is mapped.
Manually linked document GUID. No Odoo equivalent. Stored for reference.
Selection code (Exact Premium feature). No Odoo equivalent. Stored as char for reference.
Shipping method. Odoo has delivery carriers (delivery.carrier) but the mapping is not straightforward without a carrier mapping. Store GUID for reference.
Total in company currency. Odoo computes amount_total_cc from lines. Skip — computed field.
Total in transaction currency. Odoo computes amount_total from lines. Skip.
Untaxed total. Odoo computes amount_untaxed from lines. Skip.
Discount amount in company currency. Computed from line discounts in Odoo. Skip.
Discount amount excl VAT. Computed. Skip.
VAT total. Odoo computes amount_tax from lines. Skip.
Header-level discount percentage. Actual discounts applied at line level in both Exact and Odoo. Skip.
Exact stores address as separate GUID. Odoo resolves address from the partner record on dest_address_id. Skip.
Denormalized display field for Creator.
Denormalized display field for Modifier.
Denormalized display field for Approver.
Approval user. Skip — approval workflow state captured in x_aa_approval_status. Odoo manages its own approval users.
Denormalized display field for PurchaseAgent.
Denormalized display copy of supplier code. Derivable from partner_id.
Denormalized display copy of supplier name. Derivable from partner_id.
Denormalized display copy of supplier contact name.
Denormalized display copy of delivery account code.
Denormalized display copy of delivery account name.
Denormalized display copy of delivery contact name.
Denormalized display copy of payment condition.
Denormalized display copy of document subject.
Denormalized display copy of selection code.
Denormalized display copy of selection code description.
Denormalized display copy of shipping method code.
Denormalized display copy of shipping method description.
Denormalized display copy of warehouse code.
Denormalized display copy of warehouse description.
Computed count. Odoo derives from order_line.
Embedded collection — mapped separately in PurchaseOrderLines sheet.
Denormalized display copy of linked SO number. GUID stored in x_aa_sales_order_id.
Denormalized display copy of ApprovalStatus.
Derive from OrderStatus: 10(Open)→'purchase', 30(Complete)→'done', 40(Canceled)→'cancel'. Draft POs (if any) may need ApprovalStatus check.
Auto-generated by Odoo sequence (e.g., PO00001). Let Odoo assign on create. Original Exact number preserved in x_aa_order_number.
